'''Flame gems''' were valuable minerals from [[Godo]] that served as the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] main export. This gem was mined in the planet's crust using [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]] machinery and traded mainly with the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] worlds. These minerals were worth 3,500-5,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].

The flame gem was widely known not just for its electric properties, but its fiery [[Color/Legends|reddish-orange]] color that glowed in the dark.
